shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Some families are born, others are chosen, and on Sunday, both were honored. Faith, family, and love filled Saint Peter's Cathedral in Scranton as part of the Diocese of Scranton's Annual Mother's Day Adoption Mass. The service honored all mothers, with special recognition for adoptive, foster, and birth mothers. Families [...]
